title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.28.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/image/v5](https://togithub.com/containers/image) | require | minor | `v5.26.1-0.20230807184415-3fb422379cfa` -> `v5.28.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/image (github.com/containers/image/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.28.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.28.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/image/compare/v5.27.0...v5.28.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v5.26.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2013](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2013)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sigstore/rekor to v1.2.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2014](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2014)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sigstore/fulcio to v1.3.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2016](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2016)
-   Adding IO decorator to copy progress bar by [@​Pvlerick](https://togithub.com/Pvlerick) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2015](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2015)
-   Ensure we close HTTP connections on all paths by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2017](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2017)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.48.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2018](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2018)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/image-spec to v1.1.0-rc4 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2020](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2020)
-   fix(deps): update github.com/cyberphone/json-canonicalization digest to [`91eb5f1`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/commit/91eb5f1) by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2021](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2021)
-   fix(deps): update golang.org/x/exp digest to [`97b1e66`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/commit/97b1e66) by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2022](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2022)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.16.7 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2024](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2024)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/docker to v24.0.3+incompatible by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2031](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2031)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/oauth2 to v0.10.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2028](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2028)
-   manifest: `ListUpdate` add `imgspecv1.Platform` field by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2029](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2029)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/docker to v24.0.4+incompatible by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2032](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2032)
-   pkg/docker: use the same default auth path as macOS on FreeBSD by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2034](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2034)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sigstore/fulcio to v1.3.4 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2033](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2033)
-   blob: `TryReusingBlobWithOptions` consider `RequiredCompression` if set by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2023](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2023)
-   Fix tests of the ostree transport by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2037](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2037)
-   helpers_test,cleanup: correct argument order by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2039](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2039)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbauerster/mpb/v8 to v8.5.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2041](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2041)
-   Make temporary names container/image specific by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2045](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2045)
-   listupdate,oci: instance show read-only `annotations` and `CompressionAlgorithmNames` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2040](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2040)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers to v0.8.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2046](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2046)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbauerster/mpb/v8 to v8.5.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2044](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2044)
-   Fix TestOCI1IndexChooseInstanceByCompression on non-amd64 by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2043](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2043)
-   Refactor data passing in c/image/copy by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2048](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2048)
-   Update module github.com/sigstore/fulcio to v1.4.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2049](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2049)
-   copy/multiple: instanceCopyCopy honor `UpdateCompressionAlgorithms` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2047](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2047)
-   Update vendor of containers/storage by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2052](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2052)
-   copy/single: accept custom `*Options` and wrap arguments in `copySingleImageOptions` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2050](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2050)
-   Improve transport documentation by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2042](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2042)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbatts/tar-split to v0.11.5 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2053](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2053)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/docker to v24.0.5+incompatible by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2055](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2055)
-   copy: implement `instanceCopyClone` for `zstd` compression by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1987](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/1987)
-   copy/multiple: priority of `instanceCopyCopy` must be higher than `instanceCopyClone` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2059](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2059)
-   Clarify where mirrors are used by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2061](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2061)
-   fix(deps): update github.com/cyberphone/json-canonicalization digest to [`aa7fe85`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/commit/aa7fe85) by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2064](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2064)
-   fix(deps): update github.com/containers/storage digest to [`c3da76f`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/commit/c3da76f) by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2063](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2063)
-   Update x/exp/slices, and some small slice-related cleanups by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2066](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2066)
-   Use consistent example domains in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2069](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2069)
-   copy: add support for `ForceCompressionFormat` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2068](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2068)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/term to v0.11.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2073](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2073)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/crypto to v0.12.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2078](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2078)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/oauth2 to v0.11.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2080](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2080)
-   \[release-5.27] Preparing 5.27 backport by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2075](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2075)
-   Update to Go 1.19 by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2079](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2079)
-   storage.storageImageDestination.Commit(): leverage image options by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2067](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2067)
-   Rename SKOPEO_CI_TAG to SKOPEO_CI_BRANCH by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2083](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2083)
-   \[CI:DOCS] Add cirrus-cron retry/monitor jobs by [@​cevich](https://togithub.com/cevich) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2082](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2082)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230807 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2081](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2081)
-   \[release-5.27] Fix the branch we use for determining a git-validation starting point by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2084](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2084)
-   fix(deps): update golang.org/x/exp digest to [`352e893`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/commit/352e893) by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2065](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2065)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sigstore/sigstore to v1.7.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2085](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2085)
-   OCI image-spec / distribution-spec v1.1 updates, first round by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2062](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2062)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 to v2.12.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2087](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2087)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230809 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2089](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2089)
-   Merge release branch into `main` by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2070](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2070)
-   BREAKING: Update for move of github.com/theupdateframework/go-tuf/encrypted by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2054](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2054)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​Pvlerick](https://togithub.com/Pvlerick) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2015](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2015)
-   [@​mikenorgate](https://togithub.com/mikenorgate) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2104](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2104)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/image/compare/v5.27.0...v5.28.0

### [`v5.27.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.27.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/image/compare/v5.26.2...v5.27.0)

-   New `copy.Options.EnsureCompressionVariantsExist` allows creating images that are consumable by existing gzip-only consumers, but include a Zstd-compressed version is preferred by c/image.
-   OCI images using Zstd compression now carry a `io.github.containers.compression.zstd` annotation in the OCI image index.

### [`v5.26.2`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.26.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/image/compare/v5.26.1...v5.26.2)

#### What's Changed

-   \[release-5.26] c/storage to 1.48, bump c/image to v5.26.1, and then to v5.26.2-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2019](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2019)
-   \[release-5.26] Test the release-5.26 branch against the 1.13 branch of Skopeo by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2090](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2090)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/image/compare/v5.26.1...v5.26.2

</details>
